# NBOS Reference

## Purpose

NBOS is an external reference project for UI/UX and operational patterns.

Reference:

```text
https://github.com/neetrino/nbos
```

Use it as inspiration, not as a requirement to copy everything.

## Useful Patterns

- entity cards open side sheets;
- linked entities open stacked sheets, not full page navigation;
- kanban/list board standard;
- compact operational UI;
- full pages only for real workspaces or large dedicated screens.

## Rule

If NBOS is more complex than needed, implement the smaller version that fits ToonExpo.
